## PR Description
Provide a concise description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Documentation update / Refactoring

## Verification Details
Describe the tests/checks you ran to verify your changes:
- Run preflight script: `python scripts/preflight.py`
- Built on Switch SDK / devkitPro: Yes/No
- Tested on actual hardware/emulator: Yes/No

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] Any modifications are fully compatible with devkitPro & libnx.
- [ ] Cleanups and automated releases have been verified.
